embeds.description:
🟢 **All Systems Operational**

Shared DM queue between both bots. Every outgoing DM from any cog is intercepted and inserted into a shared SQLite database. A coordinator loop assigns each DM to whichever bot has capacity, enabling automatic load balancing. The worker loop on each bot picks up its assigned DMs and delivers them.

📋 `dm_shared_queue.db` • Bots online: **2/2** • Refreshes every 30s

📋 `dm_shared_queue.db` • Bots online: **2/2** • Refreshes every 30s

before.content:
# Checking loot routes grade  

- Check the route go ingame follow the route could they do this better as in
- - - Is the loot route made for where the drop map is made for that already exists
- - -  Will they land first if they land here etc are they elvated or ina. ditch etc terrain
- - - Do teams both get slurp barrels does both tema member get metal etc do they get equal loot 
- - - Are they hugging eachother tight and close meant to be that if spread get them close espcially in named poi or high key drop


- Checking spawns if correct
- Use brain of knowdelge of map if spawn not there etc tell them or if etc , shoudl eb also chekcing 90% of spawns ingame to confrim they exists as well when checking


- After rotue gameplan
- - Does the team have a plan where to rotate are the opposing teams area marked etc
- - Is there a clear path for extra loot such as slurp trucsk other chests around the area or mabye a sercrt vault mini game etc

- -  Did they mark bases where they ucold absebup for surge look at opposing teams that mabye roate ina. rtivier or in a high key named locaiton they can 3rd party a fight

- - Is it edge map dot hey got to rotate etc 

-  Chekcing key
- Is it all there in order did they choose the right place to put it willt he screenshot work witht he eky + the route etc
- Added new tech on keys ensure black box is first or you be asked to remake. ensure the black box is the back at the bottom colours not colured.

after.content:
# Checking loot routes grade  

- Check the route go ingame follow the route could they do this better as in
- - - Is the loot route made for where the drop map is made for that already exists
- - -  Will they land first if they land here etc are they elvated or ina. ditch etc terrain
- - - Do teams both get slurp barrels does both tema member get metal etc do they get equal loot 
- - - Are they hugging eachother tight and close meant to be that if spread get them close espcially in named poi or high key drop


- Checking spawns if correct
- Use brain of knowdelge of map if spawn not there etc tell them or if etc , shoudl eb also chekcing 90% of spawns ingame to confrim they exists as well when checking


- After rotue gameplan
- - Does the team have a plan where to rotate are the opposing teams area marked etc
- - Is there a clear path for extra loot such as slurp trucsk other chests around the area or mabye a sercrt vault mini game etc

- -  Did they mark bases where they ucold absebup for surge look at opposing teams that mabye roate ina. rtivier or in a high key named locaiton they can 3rd party a fight

- - Is it edge map dot hey got to rotate etc 

-  Chekcing key
- Is it all there in order did they choose the right place to put it willt he screenshot work witht he eky + the route etc
- Added new tech on keys ensure black box is first or you be asked to remake. ensure the black box is the back at the bottom colours not colured.
